feed.title: The Urban Monk
feed.subtitle: Gathers resources to help people in their search for inner peace.

entry.title: Welcome to the Urban Monk’s blog

link.title: Welcome to the Urban Monk's blog

entry.content: You’ll find on this blog resources I have found useful in my search for inner peace. I hope it helps you in yours.
entry.summary: You’ll find on this blog resources I have found useful in my search for inner peace. I hope it helps you in yours.
